jd_summary: A hands-on, execution-focused 6-month contract People Ops role on Vercel's People team (remote-US). Core work: process Workday transactions across the employee lifecycle (hires, terms, job changes, transfers), triage/resolve HR helpdesk tickets in FreshService/Serval, support onboarding/offboarding, and pull standard + ad hoc Workday reports. Explicitly NOT a strategy role.
yoe_required: 2-4 years of experience in People Operations, HR Shared Services, or a similar operational HR role

key_points.one_liner: At-level People Ops Analyst, 6-mo contract, remote-US, $95-115K - Workday transactions + HR helpdesk; not strategy.
key_points.years_experience_asked: 2-4 years in People Operations / HR Shared Services / similar operational HR role
must_have_skills: 2-4 years in People Operations, HR Shared Services, or similar operational HR role
Hands-on Workday experience (processing transactions + running reports, not just UI navigation)
Helpdesk/ticketing queue experience (FreshService, Zendesk, ServiceNow, or similar)
High attention to detail; catches data errors before they become problems
Self-directed and organized; manages own queue without daily direction
key_points.comp: Estimated annual cash salary $95,000.00 - $115,000.00 (adjusted by location; SF baseline)

sponsorship_note: silent (JD does not mention visa sponsorship or citizenship requirement; EEO statement explicitly lists 'national origin, citizenship' as protected characteristics. Note: Greenhouse application form may ask work-authorization/sponsorship questions separately.)
